title: euphorbia heyneana subsp. nilagirica
intro: Euphorbia heyneana subsp. nilagirica, also known as Nilgiri Spurge, is a subspecies of succulent plant native to the Western Ghats mountain range in India. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Euphorbia heyneana subsp. nilagirica include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used to make infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
